Cross-border privacy transfer risk after new agency guidance

Regulators emphasized transfer-impact assessments, vendor diligence, and contractual remediation steps for multinational organizations.

State privacy enforcement trends in health and consumer data

Enforcement activity continues to focus on notice accuracy, sensitive data controls, and retention practices that outlive the business need.

AI governance checklists for privacy and product teams

Product launches now require tighter documentation around training data provenance, model outputs, and escalation paths for complaints.
